title: Success story
visual_consistency: Frank Hawkins shown across time with consistent identity: young Frank has short dark hair, a kind determined oval face, average build, rolled-up sleeves, a simple blue-grey work shirt, brown work trousers, and bicycle repair tools nearby; older Frank has grey hair, the same kind face, a warm reflective smile, and a soft cardigan or modest suit jacket. Recurring motifs: bicycle wheel, hand tools, small workshop growing into a large factory, cozy family home. Gentle educational illustration, warm timeline feeling, no luxury imagery, no readable text.

frames.prompt: Young Frank Hawkins with short dark hair, kind determined face, rolled-up sleeves, simple blue-grey work shirt and brown work trousers works in a humble small repair shop, carefully repairing a bicycle on a stand. Bicycle wheel, hand tools, worn wooden bench, and soft afternoon light show practical skill and long hours without making him look miserable. Warm grounded beginning, no readable text.

The same young Frank Hawkins, short dark hair and rolled-up sleeves, now stands in a small workshop of his own with simple tools, a workbench, bicycle parts, and a hopeful expression. Show the feeling of a first owned workspace after years of saving money, modest and practical rather than wealthy. Keep the bicycle-wheel motif nearby, no readable text or numbers.

Frank Hawkins in early adulthood, clearly the same person with kind face and blue-grey work shirt under a work jacket, supervises a growing industrial workshop becoming a large factory. Show simple metal spare parts for aeroplanes on benches, two close helpers near him, and a larger factory space with many workers and machines in the background to imply big scale without crowding the image. Warm pride, no readable text or numbers.

Older Frank Hawkins with grey hair, same kind face, warm reflective smile, and a soft cardigan sits in a cozy home room remembering his long success story. His wife enters warmly beside a small child's bicycle that needs repair, echoing the first frame's bicycle wheel and tools. The mood is affectionate and lightly funny, not mocking, no luxury display, no readable text.
